def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Thought 1: The absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight can capture the imbalance in weight distribution.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    """
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    """
    Thought: The imbalance in weight distribution and distance can be effectively captured by introducing multiple new features that exploit inter-relationships between Left-Weight/ Distance & Right-Weight/ Distance.
    New Feature 1: weight_difference | weight_difference = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight)
    New Feature 2: distance_difference | distance_difference = abs(Left-Distance - Right-Distance)
    New Feature 3: weight_difference_fraction_left_to_right | weight_difference_fraction_left_to_right = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight) / (Left-Distance + Right-Distance)
    New Feature 4: weight_difference_fraction_right_to_left | weight_difference_fraction_right_to_left = abs(Right-Weight - Left-Weight) / (Left-Distance + Right-Distance)
    New Feature 5: right_weight_over_left_distance | right_weight_over_left_distance = Right-Weight / Left-Distance
    New Feature 6: right_distance_over_left_weight | right_distance_over_left_weight = Right-Distance / Left-Weight
    New Feature 7: max_weight_difference_per_distance | max_weight_difference_per_distance = abs(Left-Weight - Right-Weight) / max(Left-Distance, Right-Distance)
    """
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    
    # Calculate absolute difference between Left-Weight and Right-Weight
    df_output['weight_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight'])
    
    # Calculate absolute difference between Left-Distance and Right-Distance
    df_output['distance_difference'] = abs(df_output['Left-Distance'] - df_output['Right-Distance'])
    
    # Calculate the fraction of weight difference relative to the total distance
    df_output['weight_difference_fraction_left_to_right'] = abs(df_output['Left-Weight'] - df_output['Right-Weight']) / (df_output['Left-Distance'] + df_output['Right-Distance'])
    df_output['weight_difference_fraction_right_to_left'] = abs(df_output['Right-Weight'] - df_output['Left-Weight']) / (df_output['Left-Distance'] + df_output['Right-Distance'])
    
    # Calculate the ratio of right weight to left distance
    df_output['right_weight_over_left_distance'] = df_output['Right-Weight'] / df_output['Left-Distance']
